headline: A Look At EMCOR Group's (EME) Valuation After Strong 2025 Results And Upbeat 2026 Guidance
summary: EMCOR Group (EME) has been in focus after reporting fourth quarter and full year 2025 results, issuing 2026 guidance, and outlining a growing project backlog that has influenced recent analyst views. See our latest analysis for EMCOR Group. At a share price of US$720.18, EMCOR Group has seen some cooling in the near term, with a 30 day share price return of 7.22% and a 7 day return of 2.79%. Recent earnings, 2026 guidance, and the upcoming Cantor Global Technology & Industrial Growth...
